exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS total_sales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN "OrderItem" oi
  ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', ''))
WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2022-06-25') AND date('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;
